title: Eloria
description: New enchants ! (more stuff coming soon) Early alpha
body:
This mod adds new enchantments and plans to add much more things especially concerning structures and mobs.

# **Boss**

- Wither revamped : 3 custom attacks / 1024 Health point / Damage reduction
- Dragon revamped : 3 custom attacks / 1024 Health point / Damage reduction / Drops dragon scale

# **Enchantments**

- Flexibility : Negates fall damages and allows you to walk onto another block without jumping
- Frenzy : Improves your weapon attack speed
- Reach : Improves your overhall reach
- Shockwave : Makes your attack speed much slower but damage all the entities nearby up to 90%
- Wisdom : Improves xp drops
- Vampire : Gives you some golden hearts for each mob killed
- Lightning : Summons a lightning bolt where you shoot

# **Items**

- Wisdom Book : Allows you to store experience into a book that you can use later by sneak and right clicking
- Soul Rail : Allows you to go faster with a minecart and doesn't need to be powered ! (it is recommended to use the experiment for minecart datapack provided by mojang as it increases the maximum speed value)

# **Machinery**

- The Moduling Station : This new block allows you to create new tools in dragonite. At the moment it is its only use but more things are coming in the near future!

This mod supports both english and french languages
